# Intent Belief — Bayesian intent estimation via hypothesis generation and update

> Maintains a belief distribution over candidate intents. Generates multiple intent hypotheses as prior, then iteratively updates beliefs through diagnostic questions and likelihood estimation.

## Contents

- [Parameters](#parameters)

## Parameters {#parameters}

| key | type | required | description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `ctx.confidence_threshold` | number | optional | Stop when top hypothesis exceeds this (default 0.7) |
| `ctx.diagnose_tokens` | number | optional | Max tokens per diagnostic question (default 400) |
| `ctx.max_rounds` | number | optional | Maximum belief update rounds (default 3) |
| `ctx.n_hypotheses` | number | optional | Number of intent hypotheses to generate (default 5) |
| `ctx.prior_tokens` | number | optional | Max tokens for prior generation (default 600) |
| `ctx.task` | string | **required** | Initial user request (required) |
| `ctx.update_tokens` | number | optional | Max tokens per belief update (default 500) |

fields.doc: Whether MAP exceeded confidence_threshold before max_rounds (success path)
fields.name: converged

fields.doc: Set only on prior-parse failure; success path omits this
fields.name: error

fields.doc: Shannon entropy of final posterior (success path)
fields.name: final_entropy

fields.doc: Posterior probability of MAP hypothesis (success path)
fields.name: map_confidence

fields.doc: Description of maximum-a-posteriori hypothesis (success path)
fields.name: map_hypothesis

fields.doc: Echo of input task (success path)
fields.name: original_task

fields.doc: All hypotheses sorted by posterior desc (success path)
fields.name: ranked_hypotheses

fields.doc: Posterior probability after the last update round (0-1)
fields.name: belief

fields.doc: Hypothesis text
fields.name: description

fields.doc: Hypothesis index in the original parse order (1-based)
fields.name: id

fields.doc: Raw prior LLM output; present only on error path
fields.name: raw

fields.doc: Number of update rounds actually executed (success path)
fields.name: rounds

fields.doc: LLM-rewritten task aligned to MAP hypothesis (success path)
fields.name: specified_task

fields.doc: Per-round Bayesian update trace (success path)
fields.name: update_log

fields.doc: User's answer via alc.specify
fields.name: answer

fields.doc: Shannon entropy of posterior in bits
fields.name: entropy

fields.doc: Per-hypothesis likelihood from this round's evidence
fields.name: likelihoods

fields.doc: Belief distribution after Bayesian update
fields.name: posterior

fields.doc: Belief distribution before this round
fields.name: prior

fields.doc: Diagnostic question asked this round
fields.name: question

fields.doc: Round index (1-based)
fields.name: round
